title: Catalog source record
description: Minimum sanitized context required to understand why catalog information was added. Raw private conversations, credentials, serial numbers, collector identifiers, IP addresses, and account identifiers must not be committed.

reference.description: Durable maintainer identity such as project-issue:<id>, project-attachment:<token>, sha256:<hash>, private:<token>, or fixture:<name>. Public URLs should not be committed to the public model catalog.

summary_publishable.description: Whether the sanitized summary of a PRIVATE source may be rendered in the generated journal. Public sources are always publishable. Defaults to false.
